a2a:agent-card.a2a:json: { "protocolVersion": "0.3.0", "name": "atelier-logistics-agent", "description": "物流担当 AI エージェント (Atelier 用 同期 A2A 版)。在庫照会 / 仮確保 / 仮確保キャンセルを LLM tool-use ループで実施し、統合サマリを返す。リスクスコア更新・KG 記録は対象外 (legal-agent 経路)。", "url": "${agent.public.url}", "version": "1.0.0", "preferredTransport": "JSONRPC", "capabilities": { "streaming": false, "pushNotifications": false, "stateTransitionHistory": false }, "defaultInputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "defaultOutputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "skills": [ { "id": "logistics_handle_incident", "name": "物流インシデント対応 (LLM tool-use)", "description": "サプライヤー品質インシデント連絡を自然文で受け取り、在庫照会 / 仮確保 / 仮確保キャンセル を tool-use ループで実施し、統合サマリを返す。", "examples": [ "INC-2026-0521 関西部品 P-2024-KAN-001 (500個 HIGH) の予約 RSV-2026-1134 をキャンセルし、代替 P-2024-ALT-005 を仮確保してほしい。" ], "inputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "outputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "tags": ["logistics", "inventory", "reservation"] } ] }

logger.message: #['atelier-logistics-agent A2A task received. method=' ++ (attributes.jsonRpcMethod default '?') ++ ' taskId=' ++ (attributes.taskId default '?')]

ee:transform.doc:name: extract user text + task ids + contextId

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((attributes.taskId default (now() as String)) as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload

%dw 2.0 output application/java var p = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload var fromAttr = (attributes.contextId default "") as String var fromMsg = (p.message.contextId default "") as String --- if (fromAttr != "") fromAttr else fromMsg

%dw 2.0 output application/java var p = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload var dataParts = ((p.message.parts default []) filter ((x) -> (x.kind default x."type" default "") == "data")) --- if (sizeOf(dataParts) > 0) (dataParts[0].data default null) else null

logger.message: #['logistics-agent: directPart=' ++ (if (vars.directPart != null) 'yes' else 'no') ++ ' userText=' ++ ((vars.userText default '') as String)]

choice.doc:name: broker direct (data part) か 人間 自然文か

logger.message: #['log intent pipeline failed: ' ++ (error.description default error.message default 'unknown')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- "⚠️ atelier-logistics-agent: 処理中にエラーが発生しました。\n" ++ " " ++ ((error.description default (error.message default "unknown")) as String)

%dw 2.0
output application/java
var t = ((vars.finalText default "") as String)
var msgs = (vars.messages default [])
var lastAssistant = (msgs filter ((m) -> ((m.role default "") as String) == "assistant" and ((m.content default "") as String) != ""))
var lastAssistantContent = if (sizeOf(lastAssistant) > 0) ((lastAssistant[-1].content default "") as String) else ""
var fallbackByReason =
  if ((vars.finishReason default "") as String == "length")
    "ℹ️ 物流 (atelier-logistics-agent) です。

回答が文字数上限に達しました。
部品番号・必要数・インシデント ID のいずれかを指定して再度お試しください。"
  else
    "ℹ️ 物流 (atelier-logistics-agent) です。

**実行可能な操作**
- 取引先のゴールデン ID 解決
- 過去インシデント・取引先関係の照会
- 取引先一覧 (region / status / リスクスコア範囲で絞込み)
- 取引先 region 一覧 (各 region の件数付き)
- 部品在庫の照会
- 在庫の仮確保
- 仮確保のキャンセル

**対象外** (依頼されても実施しません): サプライヤーリスクスコア更新 / KG (オントロジー) 記録 / 法務契約照会 / 発注ドラフト / 承認依頼送信 / インシデント採番。

お手数ですが部品番号・必要数・インシデント ID のいずれかを指定してください。"
---
if (t != "") t
else if (lastAssistantContent != "") lastAssistantContent
else fallbackByReason
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- 0
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

%dw 2.0 output application/java var sysPrompt = "あなたは物流担当 AI (atelier-logistics-agent)。専門領域は inventory (在庫) のみ。
" ++ "
" ++ "=== STEP 0: メタ質問 (scope / capability) は STEP 1 を飛ばして自然文で答える ===
" ++ "
" ++ "ユーザが「何ができる?」「インシデント登録もできる?」「君の役割は?」のようなツール実行を伴わない質問をしてきたら、 NEED_INFO ゲートを発動せず、 1〜3 行の自然文で簡潔に答える。
" ++ " - できる: 在庫照会 / 仮確保 / 仮確保のキャンセル。
" ++ " - できない (担当外): インシデント起票 (incident-agent) / 法務 (legal-agent) / 発注 (procurement-agent) / 承認依頼 (org-agent) / supplier・part の正規化 ID 解決・代替部品検索 (broker または MDM)。
" ++ " → 担当外の依頼は、 担当する agent に直接話すか broker に投げてもらうよう案内する。
" ++ "
" ++ "具体的に在庫関連のツール実行を頼まれたときだけ、 STEP 1 のゲートに進む。
" ++ "
" ++ "=== STEP 1: 最優先 — NEED_INFO ゲート (ツール実行依頼に対してのみ発動。 違反する出力は重大エラー) ===
" ++ "
" ++ "次のいずれかが揃っていなければ、 何があっても tool を呼ばず、 ADVISORY/EXECUTE テンプレも一切書かず、 [NEED_INFO] block だけを返す:
" ++ " - partNumber (正規化済の P-YYYY-... 形式)。 ユーザが「P-2024-KAN-001」と言っていれば OK。 「あの部品」「ハンドル部品」のような曖昧表現は不可。
" ++ " - requiredQuantity (整数。 reserve_inventory に必要)。 「在庫確認だけ」のときは check_inventory に必須ではない。
" ++ " - reservationId (cancel_inventory_reservation 時のみ。 RES-XXXX 形式)。
" ++ "
" ++ " **絶対禁止例 (これらは重大エラー)**:
" ++ " - 部品名「ハンドル部品」を見て partNumber="P-HANDLE-001" を勝手に作る → ❌
" ++ " - サプライヤー名 → 部品番号のマッピングを推測する → ❌
" ++ " - 不足を埋めずに ADVISORY テーブルに値を埋めて返す → ❌
" ++ "
" ++ "NEED_INFO 出力フォーマット (これだけを返す。 他のテキスト/テーブル/絵文字は書かない):
" ++ "
" ++ " [NEED_INFO]
" ++ " - <question 1 — ユーザの最後のメッセージと同じ言語で書く。 日本語で来たら日本語で問い返す。 normalized ID or value を要求すること>
" ++ " - <question 2 ...>
" ++ " [/NEED_INFO]
" ++ "
" ++ "自分のドメイン外 (supplier ID 解決、 代替部品、 region、 法務、 発注、 承認、 インシデント採番) も同じ方式で [NEED_INFO] を返す。
" ++ "上位 (broker または人間) が解決して回答したら、 その値を使って自分の tool を実行する。
" ++ "
" ++ "=== STEP 2: 全項目揃った場合のみ — 通常の処理 ===
" ++ "
" ++ "利用可能 tool: check_inventory / reserve_inventory / cancel_inventory_reservation のみ。
" ++ "
" ++ "動作モード: ADVISORY (相談・提案モード)
" ++ " - 基本姿勢は「在庫状況を調べて、 何をすべきか提案する」。 副作用 tool (reserve_inventory / cancel_inventory_reservation) は **ユーザが明示的に指示したときだけ** 呼ぶ。
" ++ " - 例: 「P-2024-KAN-001 の在庫不足が出ました」 → check_inventory で状況を把握し、 推奨アクションを箇条書き。 勝手に reserve_inventory を呼ばない。
" ++ " - 例: 「800 個仮確保してください」「reservationId XXX をキャンセルして」 → 副作用 tool を実行。
" ++ "
" ++ "tool の引数: ユーザの最後の user メッセージに登場する固有名詞 (部品番号・必要数・予約ID) をそのまま使う。「PART-0001」「placeholder」などの仮名は絶対に使わない。
" ++ "
" ++ "tool の返り値:
" ++ " - check_inventory → result.quantityOnHand / result.available / result.warehouse / result.leadTimeHours
" ++ " - reserve_inventory → result.reservationId / result.ttlSeconds
" ++ " - cancel_inventory_reservation → result.status (CANCELLED など)
" ++ "
" ++ "出力フォーマット:
" ++ " [ADVISORY] 📦 logistics-agent: <一言サマリ> / 部品 <partNumber> / 在庫 <quantityOnHand>個 (必要 <requiredQuantity>) LT <leadTimeHours>h / 推奨: 必要数仮確保 (TTL 86400s)
" ++ " [EXECUTE] 📦 logistics-agent: <実行サマリ> / 部品 <partNumber> / 仮確保 <reservationId> (TTL <ttlSeconds>s) / キャンセル <reservationId> → <status>" --- if ((vars.priorMessages default []) != []) (vars.priorMessages default []) ++ [{ role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String }] else [ { role: "system", content: sysPrompt }, { role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String } ]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- 1 to (p('agent.max_loops') as Number)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload default 0) - 1) as Number

logger.message: #['Agent loop done. iterations=' ++ (vars.loopCount as String) ++ ' finishReason=' ++ (vars.finishReason default '')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { model: (p('llm.model') default "gpt-5-mini") as String, max_completion_tokens: (p('llm.max_tokens') default 2048) as Number, messages: vars.messages default [], tools: vars.tools default [], tool_choice: "auto" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].message) default { role: "assistant", content: "" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].finish_reason) default "") as String
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.messages default []) ++ [(((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].message) default { role: "assistant", content: "" }]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.assistantMsg.content default "") as String)

logger.message: #['Loop iter=' ++ (vars.loopCount as String) ++ ' finishReason=' ++ (vars.finishReason default '') ++ ' tool_calls=' ++ ((sizeOf(vars.assistantMsg.tool_calls default []) as String))]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload."id" default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload.function.name default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload.function.arguments default "{}") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- read((vars.toolArgsRaw default "{}") as String, "application/json")

%dw 2.0 output application/java var n = (vars.toolName default "") as String --- if (n == "check_inventory" or n == "reserve_inventory" or n == "cancel_inventory_reservation") "inventory" else "unknown"

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.messages default []) ++ [{ role: "tool", tool_call_id: (vars.toolCallId default "") as String, content: write((vars.toolResult default {}), "application/json") as String }]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.actionsLog default []) ++ [{ tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: (vars.toolResult default {}) }]

choice.doc:name: 埋め込みJSON か 自然文か

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java var sys = "あなたは物流・在庫 agent の『意図抽出器』です。 ユーザの 1 メッセージを読み、 下記 JSON だけを出力。 説明やコードフェンスは書かない。
" ++ "
" ++ "scope: "logistics" (在庫照会・仮確保・予約取消) | "capability" | "out_of_scope"
" ++ "mode : "advise" (在庫を確認するだけ) | "execute" (仮確保まで明示依頼: 「仮確保して」「確保して」「reserve」)
" ++ "
" ++ "entities は読めた値だけ。 null 可。 推測禁止。
" ++ " partNumber (P-...) / quantity (整数) / incidentId (INC-...)
" ++ "
" ++ "出力: {"scope":"...","mode":"advise","entities":{"partNumber":null,"quantity":null,"incidentId":null},"rawMessage":"原文"}" --- [ { role: "system", content: sys }, { role: "user", content: "P-2024-CHU-001 を 120 台 仮確保して。INC-2026-0579" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "logistics", mode: "execute", entities: { partNumber: "P-2024-CHU-001", quantity: 120, incidentId: "INC-2026-0579" }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "P-2024-KYU-001 の在庫ある?" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "logistics", mode: "advise", entities: { partNumber: "P-2024-KYU-001", quantity: null, incidentId: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "何ができる?" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "capability", mode: "advise", entities: { partNumber: null, quantity: null, incidentId: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "返品要求を発行して" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "out_of_scope", mode: "advise", entities: { partNumber: null, quantity: null, incidentId: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String } ]

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { model: (p('llm.model') default "gpt-5-mini") as String, max_completion_tokens: (p('llm.max_tokens') default 2048) as Number, messages: (vars.extractMessages default []) }

logger.message: #['log-agent scope=' ++ (vars.intent.scope default '?') ++ ' mode=' ++ (vars.intent.mode default '?') ++ ' entities=' ++ write(vars.intent.entities default {}, 'application/json')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "🚚 物流・在庫 (atelier-logistics-agent) です。

**できること**
- 在庫照会 (在庫数・倉庫・リードタイム)
- 在庫の仮確保 (予約)
- 予約の取消

**担当外**: インシデント (incident) / 法務 (legal) / 発注 (procurement) / 承認 (org)。"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "その依頼は物流 agent の担当外です。\nインシデントは incident、 法務は legal、 発注は procurement、 承認は org、 もしくは broker へ。"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "[NEED_INFO]\n- 対象の部品番号 (P-YYYY-... 形式) を教えてください。\n[/NEED_INFO]"
#['check_inventory']
#['inventory']

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { partNumber: (vars.intent.entities.partNumber default "") as String } ++ (if (vars.intent.entities.quantity != null) { requiredQuantity: vars.intent.entities.quantity } else {})
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.toolResult.result default vars.toolResult default {})

when.expression: #[(vars.intent.mode default "advise") == "execute" and (vars.intent.entities.quantity default null) != null and (vars.intent.entities.incidentId default null) != null]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: #['reserve_inventory']
#['inventory']

%dw 2.0 output application/java var r = (vars.toolResult.result default vars.toolResult default {}) var inv = vars.inv default {} fun cell(v) = if (v == null or (v as String) == "") "—" else (v as String) --- "🚚 物流エージェント (実行完了)

" ++ "| 項目 | 値 |
|---|---|
" ++ "| 部品 | **" ++ cell(vars.intent.entities.partNumber) ++ "** |
" ++ "| 在庫数 | " ++ cell(inv.quantityOnHand) ++ " (" ++ cell(inv.warehouse) ++ ") |
" ++ "| 仮確保 | **" ++ cell(r.reservationId) ++ "** (" ++ cell(vars.intent.entities.quantity) ++ "個 / TTL " ++ cell(r.ttlSeconds) ++ "s) |"

%dw 2.0 output application/java var inv = vars.inv default {} fun cell(v) = if (v == null or (v as String) == "") "—" else (v as String) --- "🚚 物流エージェント (在庫照会)

" ++ "| 項目 | 値 |
|---|---|
" ++ "| 部品 | **" ++ cell(vars.intent.entities.partNumber) ++ "** |
" ++ "| 在庫数 | " ++ cell(inv.quantityOnHand) ++ " |
" ++ "| 倉庫 | " ++ cell(inv.warehouse) ++ " |
" ++ "| リードタイム | " ++ cell(inv.leadTimeHours) ++ "h |

" ++ "数量と incidentId を添えて「仮確保して」で予約します。"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.directPart.tool default vars.directPart.toolName default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.directPart.args default vars.directPart."input" default {})

%dw 2.0 output application/java var n = (vars.directPart.tool default vars.directPart.toolName default "") as String --- if (n == "check_inventory" or n == "reserve_inventory" or n == "cancel_inventory_reservation") "inventory" else "unknown"

logger.message: #['logistics-agent direct fast-path: tool=' ++ (vars.toolName default '') ++ ' args=' ++ write(vars.toolArgs default {}, 'application/json')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write({ status: "error", agent: "atelier-logistics-agent", mode: "direct", result: { code: "UNKNOWN_TOOL", message: "unsupported tool for direct mode: " ++ (vars.toolName default ""), supported: ["check_inventory","reserve_inventory","cancel_inventory_reservation"] } }, "application/json") as String

ee:transform.doc:name: wrap direct result as JSON reply

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write({ status: "ok", agent: "atelier-logistics-agent", mode: "direct", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: (vars.toolResult default {}) }, "application/json") as String

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { toolName: (vars.toolName default "") as String, "input": (vars.toolArgs default {}) }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: { code: "UNKNOWN_TOOL", message: "no MCP for tool: " ++ (vars.toolName default "") } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: { code: "MCP_CALL_FAILED", message: (error.description default error.message default "unknown") as String } }

logger.message: #['MCP call failed kind=' ++ (vars.mcpKind default '') ++ ' tool=' ++ (vars.toolName default '') ++ ' err=' ++ (error.description default error.message default 'unknown')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

%dw 2.0 output application/java fun parseList(s) = if (s == null or s == "") [] else read(s, "application/json") --- if (vars.priorRaw == null) [] else if (vars.priorRaw is String) parseList(vars.priorRaw as String) else (vars.priorRaw default [])
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

logger.message: #['memory load: contextId=' ++ (vars.contextId default '') ++ ' priorMessages=' ++ (sizeOf(vars.priorMessages default []) as String)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write((vars.messages default []), "application/json") as String

logger.message: #['memory save: contextId=' ++ (vars.contextId default '') ++ ' messages=' ++ (sizeOf(vars.messages default []) as String)]
